title: ChatGPT Image2 Prompt Compilation and Rendered Panel QA
summary: Rules for compiling panel cards into gpt-image-2 prompts, preserving visual continuity, keeping text out of generated art, and QA-scoring rendered panel output.

rules.title: Prompt from panel cards, not raw prose
rules.instruction: Each prompt must be compiled from a structured panel card with panel ID, aspect ratio, frozen moment, continuity anchors, medical constraints, and text policy.
rules.failureMessage: A render prompt is missing required panel-card inputs.

rules.title: Use the Image2 prompt order
rules.instruction: Prompts should state panel ID/aspect ratio/text policy, frozen moment, continuity anchors, composition, action and emotion, medical constraints, style, required details, negative constraints, and final output requirements.
rules.failureMessage: A gpt-image-2 prompt is missing the required compilation order.

rules.title: Keep lettering out of image generation
rules.instruction: Generated panel art must not include dialogue, captions, labels, educational text, or fake medical text. Lettering belongs in separate overlays.
rules.failureMessage: Visible text appears in an image prompt or rendered asset QA decision.

rules.title: Use continuity bible and stable visual IDs
rules.instruction: Repeated characters, props, devices, set pieces, anatomy environments, and style locks must be represented by stable visual reference IDs.
rules.failureMessage: A recurring visual element is not covered by a stable reference item.

rules.title: Preserve medical truth ledger links
rules.instruction: Clinically meaningful visual decisions must stay connected to claim references and must-not-show constraints.
rules.failureMessage: A clinically material panel lacks traceable claim references or medical fidelity checks.

rules.title: QA rendered panels across all Image2 domains
rules.instruction: Rendered-panel QA must cover source fidelity, character continuity, prop/device continuity, scene continuity, medical accuracy, style compliance, slide usability, and text hygiene.
rules.failureMessage: Rendered-panel QA is missing one or more critical quality domains.

items.label: Prompt includes panel ID, aspect ratio, and no-visible-text policy.
Prompt names the single frozen moment to render.
Prompt includes continuity anchors and approved reference IDs.
Prompt includes clinically relevant anatomy/mechanism constraints.
Visible text is excluded from image prompts and handled in lettering maps.
Rendered panel matches approved panel card and guide/reference provenance.
Cyto and Pip remain visually and personality-consistent.
Anatomy, devices, and mechanisms match the medical truth ledger.
No generated speech, captions, fake labels, or fake clinical text appear in art.

promptModules.title: Global Felt 3D Style
promptModules.template: premium cinematic 3D animated felt-toy rendering, warm feature-animation lighting, soft tactile fibers, expressive eyes, stable silhouettes, accurate approachable anatomy environments

promptModules.title: Text-Free Medical Art
promptModules.template: leave clean slide-safe space for later lettering; do not render dialogue, captions, labels, medical text, monitor text, or educational copy inside the image

promptModules.title: Patient Dignity
promptModules.template: depict patient experience with warmth, dignity, and no ridicule; make illness understandable without blaming the patient

promptModules.title: Device Accuracy
promptModules.template: show medical devices only when specified by the approved panel card and keep placement anatomically plausible

promptModules.title: Slide-Safe Space
promptModules.template: preserve unobstructed areas for post-generation lettering overlays without weakening the focal action

promptModules.title: No-Drift Continuity
promptModules.template: reuse approved visual reference IDs and previous approved panels to keep character proportions, props, costumes, set pieces, palette, and medical environment stable

gateCriteria.blockingWhen: Any render prompt lacks prompt-order fields, reference IDs, medical constraints, or text separation.
gateCriteria.failureMessage: Rendering cannot proceed until prompt compilation and visual consistency guidance checks pass.

gateCriteria.blockingWhen: Any critical rendered-panel QA domain fails.
gateCriteria.failureMessage: Export cannot proceed with rendered-panel QA critical failures.
